chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4827 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "وَ لاَ يَكُونُ اَلظِّهَارُ إِلاَّ عَلَى مَوْضِعِ اَلطَّلاَقِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4827 - And Imam (as) said: "Ẓihar (a form of divorce by comparison) does not apply except in the context where divorce is applicable."
